description: FATHIYA CORE — OpenRouter multi-model routing contract. Maps task classes to model slots. No direct trading decisions allowed.

fast.purpose: Fast tasks: formatting, classification, keyword extraction

reasoning.purpose: Complex reasoning: scenario analysis, planning, crypto intelligence

critic.purpose: Critique: quality gate, failure modes, risk review, bias detection

structured.purpose: Structured output: JSON extraction, schema filling

task_classes.description: Small text transforms, markdown cleanup, output formatting
Keyword matching, tag extraction, retrieval ranking
Classify raw content: category, type, tags
Scenario building, narrative analysis, signal card generation
Detect forbidden trading commands, FOMO, certainty claims
Failure modes, hidden risks, bias review, invalidation conditions
JSON extraction, schema filling from unstructured text

fallback_rules: If model slot env var is missing, use fallback model.
If OpenRouter API key is missing, return error with receipt_id.
If task class is unknown, route to default slot.
If quality_gate fails, block output and return blocked receipt.

no_direct_trading_decision_rule.description: No model output may contain a direct trading decision. All crypto outputs must pass quality_gate before being stored or returned.
